BaseRadar is a free crypto ecosystem velocity tracker. It monitors token momentum across Solana, Base, and Ethereum, scoring tokens 0-100 with signal tiers: SURGE (70-100), RISING (50-70), STABLE (30-50), FADING (0-30). Data refreshes every 5 minutes from DexScreener, Zora, and PumpFun. The free tier shows daily movers, ecosystem rankings, and token velocity scores. BotIndex Pro ($9.99/mo) adds convergence signals, prediction track records, unlimited alerts, and API access. Visit https://baseradar.app
